data.text: M02/P04 FELISIAN AND NOT VERY EXPLORATION FRIENDLY; LANDINGS AT
284.56, 13.59, 31.33 WERE ON BARREN AND EXTREMELY ROUGH
MOUNTAINOUS GROUND, WITH 341.105 BEING THE SAME AND COLD, THOUGH
40.96 WAS SAME WITH GORGES IN THE DISTANCE TO THE NORTH AND WEST,
244.93 ALSO SAME WITH A NEARBY GORGE, BUT THE RED LIGHT FROM THE
SUNSET UNDER POOR LIGHTING MADE THE PLACE SEEM UNWHOLSOME. RELIEF-
IF IT COULD BE CALLED THAT- WAS AT 3.004 WHERE IT WAS FLATTER BUT
COLD AND BARREN- AT LEAST THERE WAS BIRDLIFE. PRO 0.274.680 PRV 0.
